Secondly, fact-check any information that you come across by cross-verifying it from multiple sources. Thirdly, use reputable sources for news and information, such as established media outlets. Secondly, fact-check any information that you come across by cross-verifying it from multiple sources. Thirdly, use reputable sources for news and information, such as established media outlets. By following these steps, you can effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media.
